BNN-DP is a method specifically designed to certify the adversarial robustness of Bayesian Neural Networks.
BNN-DP is based on a reformulation of adversarial robustness as a dynamic programming problem.
Efficient relaxations can be derived for the dynamic program to make it computationally feasible.
Experiments were conducted on various datasets for both regression and classification tasks.
BNN-DP outperforms existing methods in the experiments
The success of BNN-DP suggests its potential for use in applications where robustness is essential.
